title: Upgrade Telar
subtitle: A newer version of Telar is available for your site
changesDescription: Upgrading updates the code that builds your site, not your content. Your stories, objects, and settings will not be affected.
upgradeSuccessDetail: Your site has been upgraded to {{version}}. The build is now running.
upgradeFailedDetail: Something went wrong during the upgrade. You can retry or check the GitHub Actions log for details.
staleHead: Your repository has changed since this page loaded. Please re-sync before upgrading.
belowMinimum: Your site is running {{version}}, which is too old for the compositor. Please run the manual upgrade script to reach at least v0.9.0 before connecting.
hint_whatIsUpgrade: An upgrade updates the code that generates your website (layouts, stylesheets, scripts) to the latest version. It does not change your content (stories, objects, images).
hint_whatIsVersion: The version number tells you which release of the Telar framework your site uses. Newer versions may include bug fixes, new features, or design improvements.
hint_whatIsBuild: After the upgrade, GitHub rebuilds your site with the updated code. This usually takes 1-2 minutes.
postUpgradeChecklistDescription: These are optional steps you may want to review after upgrading:
noChecklist: No manual steps needed for this upgrade.
versionGate: Your site needs to be upgraded before you can {{operation}}.
